phrases.intent_en: Ask about the opening hours of the shop
phrases.cultural_note: The Maille boutique has regular shop hours and sometimes opens Sundays in tourist season.

responses.phonetic: duh dee zuhr ah dee-nuhf uhr, doo luhn-DEE oh sahm-DEE
responses.french: De dix heures à dix-neuf heures, du lundi au samedi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a tasting of different mustards
phrases.cultural_note: The shop offers tastings of their many varieties. Don't miss the old-style wholegrain and the raspberry mustard.

responses.english: Yes, tasting is free. Try several varieties.
responses.phonetic: wee, lah day-goos-tah-SYON eh grah-TWEET. eh-say-YAY plu-ZYUHR vah-ree-ay-TAY
responses.french: Oui, la dégustation est gratuite. Essayez plusieurs variétés.

phrases.cultural_note: Maille ships worldwide. They have an online store but the shop prices are often better, and you can try before you buy.

responses.english: Yes, you can order online or ask in the shop.
responses.phonetic: wee, voo poo-VAY koh-mahn-DAY ahn leen oo duh-mahn-DAY ahn boo-TEEK
responses.french: Oui, vous pouvez commander en ligne ou demander en boutique.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what the difference is between mustards
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la différence entre les différentes moutardes ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah day-fay-RANS an-tray lay day-fay-RANT moo-TARD
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional Dijon mustard uses white wine and verjuice. Flavored varieties add ingredients like fig, raspberry, or tarragon.

responses.english: The difference comes from the ingredients and the taste: some are stronger, others milder or more flavored.
responses.phonetic: lah dee-fay-RAHNS vee-AHN dayz ahn-gray-dee-AHN ay doo goo: sair-TEN son ploo fort, DOHTR ploo doos oo par-fyoo-MAY
responses.french: La différence vient des ingrédients et du goût : certaines sont plus fortes, d'autres plus douces ou parfumées.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a gift box recommendation
phrases.pronunciation: poo-VAY voo muh ruh-ko-mahn-DAY oon bwat-kah-DOH
phrases.cultural_note: Maille offers beautiful gift sets with multiple mustard varieties, vinegars, and oils. They're perfect for food-loving friends.

responses.english: I recommend a gift box with several mustards so you can try different flavors.
responses.phonetic: zhuh voo ruh-koh-MAHND uhn koh-FRAY ah-VEK plu-ZYUR moo-TARD poor goo-TAY dee-fay-RAHNT sah-VEUR
responses.french: Je vous recommande un coffret avec plusieurs moutardes pour goûter différentes saveurs.
